risks.title: Intense Competition and Lower Fares
risks.description: Lufthansa faces significant competition leading to lower fares which squeeze profit margins. This is exacerbated by the presence of discount airlines like Ryanair.
risks.evidence: The Fight Of The CEOs Of Lufthansa And Ryanair, Der Lufthansa leidet unter harter Konkurrenz und billigeren Flugtickets - DER SPIEGEL

risks.title: Seasonal Income Fluctuations
risks.description: The income and profits of the Lufthansa Group are subject to seasonal fluctuations, impacting financial stability.
risks.evidence: PDF  Deutsche Lufthansa Aktiengesellschaft - Oblible.com. Der Lufthansa Konzern veränderte Wettbewerbsstrategien im Vergleich zu den größten Konkurrenten der Branche - EconBiz

risks.title: Customer Service Complaints and Ratings Issues
risks.description: Lufthansa's customer service has faced numerous complaints which may affect their reputation and potential revenue from loyal customers.
risks.evidence: Reach Lufthansa Customer Service Reviews And Complaints, Lufthansa customer service is ranked out of the 1025 companies that have a CustomerServiceScoreboard.com rating with an overall score of 37.53 out of ...

risks.title: Regulatory Challenges in EU Air Transport
risks.description: High costs, competition distortions and bureaucracy within the European Union's aviation sector require regulatory adjustments to improve efficiency.
risks.evidence: Wettbewerb. Hohe Kosten, Wettbewerbsverzerrungen und Bürokratie belasten den EU-Luftverkehr. ... Aufsichtsrat der Lufthansa Group fordert EU-Kommission und die kommende Bundesregierung zur Kurskorrektur auf

opportunities.title: Expanding Long Haul Network and Reducing Domestic Feeder Flights
opportunities.description: Lufthansa is extending its long haul services into summer routes, increasing international connectivity while reducing domestic feeder flights.
opportunities.evidence: Lufthansa expands long haul network while reducing domestic feeder...

opportunities.title: AI-Powered Aircraft Turnarounds at Frankfurt Airport
opportunities.description: The introduction of AI-powered cameras is streamlining aircraft turnarounds, significantly enhancing efficiency and cutting down delays.
opportunities.evidence: Lufthansa s AI Revolution Speeding Up Aircraft Turnarounds

opportunities.title: Growth in International Routes with New Johannesburg & São Paulo Services
opportunities.description: Resuming flights to Johannesburg and Sao Paulo as part of an expanded international network will open new markets for Lufthansa.
opportunities.evidence: Lufthansa expands long haul network while reducing domestic feeder...

opportunities.title: Strengthening Corporate Responsibility within Global Aviation Group
opportunities.description: Integrating sustainable and responsible practices into its corporate strategy positions Lufthansa as a leader in ethical aviation.
opportunities.evidence: Company Management Lufthansa Group - The Lufthansa Group is a global aviation group with around...

trends.title: Digitalization of Cockpit and Flight Bag Systems
trends.description: Lufthansa is transitioning towards a more digitalized cockpit by introducing Electronic Flight Bags (EFB) for Lufthansa Passage, Cityline, Cargo, leading the industry in this transformative step.
trends.evidence: Introduction of Electronic Flight Bag und paperless Cockpit for Lufthansa Passage, Lufthansa CITYLINE and Lufthansa Cargo

trends.title: Fleet Modernization with Sustainable Aviation Fuel Adoption
trends.description: The Group's focus on modernizing its fleet includes integrating sustainable aviation fuels (SAFs), positioning itself as a leader in sustainability within the industry.
trends.evidence: fleet modernization including short-haul A220 and A320neo family, long haul A350, Boeing 787-9 aircraft; Sustainability by Lufthansa Group

trends.title: Premium Travel Experience Commitment
trends.description: Lufthansa is dedicated to enhancing the passenger experience through premium services across its fleet and offers.
trends.evidence: Lufthansa Focuses On A Premium Travel Experience While Critical; Lufthansa Reviews - Passenger opinions & Seat Pictures - flight review

trends.title: Strategic Market Positioning through Fleet Expansion and Partnerships
trends.description: The Group's strategy includes expanding its fleet capacity, as indicated by the planned delivery of new aircraft types in future years. This also involves strategic partnerships like selling AirAlliance GmbH to Pilatus Aircraft.
trends.evidence: Fleet Modernization - Lufthansa Group; Der Verkauf der AirAlliance GmbH an Pilatus Aircraft
